case_title: DELAMORA, JULIETA Z. VS TRUONG, KHANH et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DELAMORA, JULIETA Z. AS TO DEFENDANT TRUONG, KHANH GOLDEN LAND REAL ESTATE, INC. LEWIS PROPERTY INVESTMENTS, LLC FINANCIAL TITLE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-06-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FINANCIAL TITLE COMPANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELAMORA, JULIETA Z. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRUONG, KHANH GOLDEN LAND REAL ESTATE, INC. LEWIS PROPERTY INVESTMENTS, LLC $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,050.00, TO SATISFY PARTIAL PAYMENT OF THE JUDGMENT HEREIN, DEFENDANT FINANCIAL TITLE CO. IS ORDERED TO PAY MS. JULIETA Z. DELAMORA THE $4,000 IT HAS ON DEPOSIT IN ESCROW $43137561. UPON PAYMENT OF THAT $4,000, THIS MATTER IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT FINANCIAL TITLE CO. DEFENDANT GOLDEN LAND REAL ESTATE NOT HAVING SERVED, THIS MATTER IS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO SAID DEFENDANT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED SENT TO TRUONG, KHANH.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS PROPERTY INVESTMENTS, LLC
DECLARATION OF UPDATED MAILING ADDRESS OF PLAINTIFF JULIETA Z DELAMORA FILED.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT FINANCIAL TITLE COMPANY
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TRUONG, KHANH
